props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Hero Banner background color when no background image is provided.

props.name: backgroundUrl
props.description: Background image url.

props.name: heading
props.description: Main heading text.

props.name: maxContentWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the content area.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Minimum height of the hero banner. Defaults to 600px when a background image is provided.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Text color within the hero banner.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Content rendered in the actions slot.
